summary: Admin Foundation Stage 4 screens were verified against mocked Admin API data in a local Next production build. The run covered dashboard entry, read-only user lookup, operational event detail with frontend metadata filtering, audit log browsing, unauthorized/forbidden states, disabled future navigation, desktop/mobile/narrow viewports, and horizontal overflow checks.
remainingRisks: Production/staging first admin bootstrap remains Manual Only.
Stage 5 Design Authority must still review the visual quality of these screenshots before final authority gate.

checklistCoverage.notes: Dashboard rendered with mocked admin users/events totals.
Users screen rendered masked emails and aggregate counts only.
Browser smoke injected raw email and YouTube URL into metadata; page text did not expose either value.
Audit screen rendered actor, action, target, path, result, hashes, and timestamp in read-only rows.
Unauthorized and forbidden screenshots captured; Admin data did not render before page-view verification.
Static test confirms future Admin nav entries are disabled placeholders without /admin/community, /admin/reports, or /admin/moderation links.
Browser smoke measured no whole-page horizontal overflow across 390px and 320px screenshots.
